children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), in each of the establishments listed in , there is established an Office of Inspector General.section 401(1) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: an Office of Inspector General of the Department of the Treasury; and

children.label: B
children.text: an Office of Treasury Inspector General for Tax Administration.
to conduct and supervise audits and investigations relating to the programs and operations of the establishments listed in ;section 401(1) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: to promote economy, efficiency, and effectiveness in the administration of those programs and operations; and

children.label: B
children.text: to prevent and detect fraud and abuse in those programs and operations; and

to provide a means for keeping the head of the establishments and Congress fully and currently informed about problems and deficiencies relating to the administration of those programs and operations and the necessity for and progress of corrective action.
